# Active Goals

<!-- Managed by goal-create, goal-complete, goal-fail scripts. Do not edit manually unless you know what you're doing. -->

<!-- FORMAT:
## [GOAL_ID] Title
- **description**: Full goal description
- **success_criteria**: What done looks like
- **priority**: low | medium | high | critical
- **complexity**: low | medium | high
- **constraints**: comma-separated list or none
- **created_at**: ISO timestamp
- **status**: active | paused
- **task_count**: N
-->
